title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
